name: LINE-AD emtricitabine Alzheimer disease registry
summary: Recruiting randomized double-blind placebo-controlled phase 1 study of daily 200 mg emtricitabine in biomarker-confirmed MCI or mild to moderate Alzheimer disease, with safety, inflammatory, cognitive, functional, and CSF biomarker endpoints and no posted results.
population: Adults and older adults aged 50 to 85 years with biomarker-confirmed MCI or mild to moderate Alzheimer disease
